text.title: Procurement Management Framework Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the work core capability or one-time / specialised?

branch.question: Is scope well-defined with measurable AC?

conclusion.verdict: T&M with hard cap + 70% trigger; weekly burn report
Cost Plus with monthly steering review; buyer absorbs cost risk explicitly
